user_authorisation: Delegated to Codex 2nd-opinion. User not in the loop. Telegram is notify-only (digest), never an approval block.

governance_contract.authority: AGEN-GOVN-001 v4.0 (GOVERNANCE.md). Applies to EVERY task and process. No exceptions.
governance_contract.rule_0_audit_before_build: Check Supabase tables+rowcounts, n8n workflows, GitHub bermingham85/code-artifacts for existing assets; report; build ONLY gaps; never drop populated tables.
governance_contract.rule_1_research_first: Search prior work + open-source/n8n-community/Supabase templates; if existing covers 70%+ ADAPT not rebuild; log build|adapt|reuse decision.
governance_contract.rule_2_modular_connected_documented: n8n webhooks orchestrate, Supabase persists, Notion documents; spec registered before build, completion after; tests prove spec.
governance_contract.rule_3_document_control: Register every artifact via webhook http://192.168.50.246:5678/webhook/log-entry + Notion DB 22674ec0311480a7b76cc22a158c1fd4; name [PROJECT]-[TYPE]-[NAME]-v[VERSION].[EXT].
governance_contract.naming_authority: QNAP:8767 / pipeline-governance SUB-04; muscle execution codes [PROJECT]-[ORIG]-MUSC-[SEQ5].
governance_contract.prompt_gate: Every LLM dispatch: Registry Lookup -> Governance Auditor (12-check C1-C12) -> Peer Advisor if fail -> Register -> Dispatch.
governance_contract.governance_block: Canonical 'GOVERNANCE RULES — APPLY AT ALL TIMES' block prepended verbatim to every LLM prompt at every layer.
governance_contract.twelve_check: C1 gov-block present; C2 JSON-only; C3 token limit; C4 scope bounded; C5 no cross-task deps; C6 required fields; C7 confidence field; C8-C12 full-plan checks.
governance_contract.infra_safety: Backup .bak.YYYY-MM-DD before live config edits; read-only first; infra 24/7.
governance_contract.state: Live state in Supabase (pod.* + microprompter.*); tracking in system, never memory.
governance_contract.delivery: PRs to main only; check docs/DOCUMENT_REGISTER.md before any build.
governance_contract.approval: Human gate via Telegram @Brianbrainybot (BRIAN_BOT_TOKEN); 'Got it' callback; email escalation on no-ack 24h.
governance_contract.keys: Resolve X:\Automations\claudeclaw\.env -> Windows ENV -> QNAP /share/Container/<svc>/.env. Never ask/store/relocate keys.
governance_contract.codex_gate_policy: Every approval/cert point runs: assemble packet -> outputs/.second-opinion/packet.json (strip all secrets) -> python3 scripts/review.py --packet <packet>. Decision map: PASS -> proceed/certify/auto-activate; REVISE -> apply feedback, re-review (max 2 iterations) then re-judge; REJECT -> block, keep DRAFT, write needs_revision to Supabase, Telegram notify. Provider order OpenAI(gpt-5)->Perplexity->Claude-CLI->persona-fallback; persona fallback is NOT accepted as a cert (must reach a true third-party model or the cert fails closed).
governance_contract.research_protocol: MANDATORY per task before any build (Rule-0 + Rule-1): 1) Supabase existing tables+rowcounts; 2) n8n existing workflows same name; 3) GitHub bermingham85/code-artifacts; 4) conversation/Notion prior work; 5) open-source/n8n-community/Supabase templates. If existing covers >=70% ADAPT not rebuild. Log findings + build|adapt|reuse decision to Supabase pod.research_log. No build without this.
governance_contract.fail_closed: If Codex provider unreachable or returns non-PASS, the gate fails CLOSED: artifact stays DRAFT/uncertified, run marked blocked, watchdog + Telegram notify. Never auto-proceed on a missing review.

phase_map.3: Generate (LLM/image) behind Prompt Gate + Governance Block
phase_map.6: Persist/register (Supabase pod.*, Doc Control, content_hash dedup)
phase_map.7: Dispatch/act (Printify create, Shopify publish, social) post-approval
phase_map.8: Verify/close (acceptance, watchdog heartbeat, mark Done, digest)
phase_map._reconcile: Reconcile vs /share/Container/apex-microprompter/standards/SPEC.md on QNAP via Rule-0 before build.

phases.8: Verify/close (acceptance, watchdog heartbeat, mark Done, digest)

BERM-MICH-MUSC-00018.tracking: pod.drops rows per run, never memory

ingest_note: Drop into GPU auto-completion queue. Honour depends_on. Apply governance_gates per task. Wave cap 4 hard. Approval via @Brianbrainybot.

approval_authority: Codex = OpenAI gpt-5 via second-opinion skill (scripts/review.py). Independent reviewer, different model from builder. Holds approval + certification authority. NO human gate.
revision: v3 — platform specs verified against n8n docs + real exports + Printify API; Shopify REST product-write removed from POD path

platform_specs_verified.n8n_evidence: n8n docs (Code node) + statistical extraction from 2061 real workflow exports (Zie619/n8n-workflows).
platform_specs_verified.shopify_note: POD products are created in Printify and PUBLISHED to the connected Shopify store via Printify; do NOT use Shopify Admin REST product create (deprecated). Direct Shopify writes only on the AutoDS dropshipping track, via GraphQL Admin API — confirm at build.
platform_specs_verified.codex_model: second-opinion default gpt-5 via SECOND_OPINION_OPENAI_MODEL env; confirm current OpenAI model at build (do not hardcode).
platform_specs_verified.open_items: Every external HTTP node carries TODO@build with its doc URL; field-level bodies/credentials to be completed from those docs and validated by n8n-mcp validate_workflow before activation — never guessed.
